subcodes.first_line: This lowly one submits unto your eminence that the letter of his gracious honour, the Afnán - upon him be the glory of Bahá - hath been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عرض این فانی خدمت جنابعالی آنکه دستخط آقائی حضرت افنان ۹۲ علیه منکل بهاء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @high station of the true believer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
